generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://purl.org/dc/terms/"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.com/dtdf#"

instance DS18S20Sensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Sensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Sensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code, measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3,
    base:desc "Temperature data from DS18S20 sensors uploaded to RabbitMQ message broker for processing by DT components"
]

instance ExperimentalTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Experimental trajectory data including temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors for model validation",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamic model with two parameters calibrated using non-linear least squares via Python Scipy",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamic model with four parameters calibrated using non-linear least squares via Python Scipy",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for transmitting temperature data from physical sensors to DT components",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, CalibrationService
]

instance ScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration of thermal models",
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance RaspberryPiEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for managing sensors and actuators",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, CalibrationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based temperature prediction for the thermal incubator system",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety and optimality",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OptimalityInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of thermal models using experimental data to optimize control parameters",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedControlParametersAction
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values for system simulation"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of safety violations in the thermal incubator system"
]

instance OptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of suboptimal performance in the thermal incubator system"
]

instance OptimizedControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts physical twin's parameters based on model calibration",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed requiring 4A current controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan for air circulation (0.02 m³/s airflow) controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB"
]

instance InsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for high-current driving circuits"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains InsulatedContainer, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3, RaspberryPiController, CustomPCB, PowerSupply,
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of styrofoam insulated container, heatbed, fan, temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi controller, custom PCB, and power supply"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the DT controller (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) are transmitted via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes them through the PCB's MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation integrates PT components (sensors, actuators) with DT models and algorithms via RabbitMQ communication, where the DT processes sensor data and issues control commands to the PT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle phase, integrating models and data from the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity validated through uniform temperature experiments and residual error minimization; Model B demonstrated higher accuracy in predicting heatbed thermal inertia compared to Model A."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for inter-component communication, with DS18S20 sensors connected via 1-Wire bus protocol to the Raspberry Pi controller."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and controller software deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to ensure device safety during operation, though specific cybersecurity measures are not detailed in the document."
]
